rationale: Major frictions across the board: the hook is a young male dancer in dark blue tones referencing a different game ("Crossword Go") and a late-night student vibe — palette, persona, and context all clash with Marble Sort's pastel/lavender, calm-satisfying, women 25-55 positioning. The archetype shows zero gameplay, so it can't communicate the core sorting/physics loop that drives IPM for this genre. Skip; if testing live-action UGC at all, recast with a 30-45 female creator showing ASMR-style satisfying sorting reactions instead of energetic dancing.
